This creates an asymmetric transportation advantage: the Kemari can use the river for downstream logistics, while the Dominion must rely on overland routes to reach Kemari territory. Combined with the Kemari controlling the upstream water (irrigation draws that affect the Compact's midpoint measurement), the Kestal gives the Kemari geographic advantages in both economic and military terms.
